title: The Extraordinary Case of Alex Lewis
original_title: The Extraordinary Case of Alex Lewis
overview: "The Extraordinary Case of Alex Lewis" charts the story of a man fighting to rebuild his relationships after a devastating infection took his limbs, parts of his face and his independence.
